\tzpentry{ID3704}{Quantum Pressure Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3704 introduces Quantum Pressure Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} P_{\mathrm{quantum}} = \frac{\hbar^2}{2m}(3\pi^2 n)^{2/3}. \end{equation}
